design_philosophy.core_loop: Select plays offensively/defensively, execute formation-based football sequences, manage team performance across season or exhibition matches
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Strategic play selection vs. opponent adaptation; real NFL player attributes create asymmetric matchups between teams
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Coach and play as real NFL teams with authentic rosters and player attributes; experience authentic 1990-91 NFL season football
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: First game to secure both NFL and NFLPA licenses simultaneously, enabling real teams AND real players together—a licensing breakthrough. Elevated the sports simulation genre by grounding fantasy in authentic professional data. Focused on roster authenticity and statistical fidelity over arcade simplification.

difficulty.checkpointing: Season mode with multiple-game progression; individual game completion
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Exhibition, Season, and Pro Bowl modes allow players to test skill levels; AI opponent selection varies challenge

progression.upgrade_system: Team roster/player attribute variations based on selected NFL team; performance tracking across season games
progression.unlock_mechanism: All 28 NFL teams available from start; Pro Bowl accessible via season completion
replayability_hooks: Season mode replays with different team selections
28 distinct team rosters with varying player attributes
Statistical tracking encourages optimization and comparison

world_building_techniques: Authentic NFL team names, logos, and player names ground game in real professional league
Player statistics reflect genuine 1990-91 season data
Season mode mimics official NFL structure

faction_indicators: 28 distinct NFL teams with competitive hierarchies
Player stat variations create team identity and power levels
Regional/conference affiliations implied by authentic league structure
danger_signals: Dominant player attributes on rival teams (e.g., Bo Jackson as standout performer)
Playbook depth suggests strategic complexity that rewards study and meta-knowledge
environmental_storytelling: Team rosters reflect real 1990-91 NFL season composition
Player names and attributes carry cultural/professional significance
Stadium context (though not detailed in sources) reflects authentic NFL geographic spread

sources_used: wikipedia - Tecmo Super Bowl overview, gameplay features, licensing, reception, legacy, and sequels
tcrf - development credits and hidden content documentation
